zero_results.reason: The combination of lgbtq non-negotiable + noEnglish dealbreaker + $1,500 budget produces an empty match set. Every country that is both English-speaking and has strong LGBTQ legal protections (UK, Ireland, Canada, Australia, New Zealand) exceeds the $1,500/month threshold for a solo person. No affordable English-speaking country offers equivalent LGBTQ legal protections. The three constraints are mutually exclusive at this budget tier.
